mapper.insert: insert into batch.job_task ( tenant_id, job_instance_id, job_partition_id, task_type, task_seq, task_status, assigned_worker_code, task_payload, result_summary, error_code, error_message, error_key, error_args, priority, started_at, finished_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{jobInstanceId}, #{jobPartitionId}, #{taskType}, #{taskSeq}, #{taskStatus}, #{assignedWorkerCode}, #{taskPayload,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{errorKey}, #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, coalesce(#{priority}, 5), #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} )
mapper.update: update batch.job_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, failure_class = #{failureClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finished_at = case when #{taskStatus} in (#{terminalStatus1}, #{terminalStatus2}, #{terminalStatus3}, #{terminalStatus4}) then current_timestamp else finished_at end, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{taskStatus}, result_summary = #{resultSummary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, error_key = #{errorKey}, error_args = #{errorArgs,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, failure_class = #{failureClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, finished_at = current_timestamp, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and task_status = #{expectedStatus} and version = #{expectedVersion}

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{readyStatus}, assigned_worker_code = null, error_code = null, error_message = null, error_key = null, error_args = null, failure_class = null, result_summary = null, started_at = null, finished_at = null, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} and version = #{expectedVersion}

update batch.job_task set task_status = #{targetTaskStatus}, finished_at = current_timestamp, version = version + 1, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and job_instance_id = #{jobInstanceId} and task_status in ('CREATED', 'READY', 'RUNNING')
